mower_model.title: Mower Model
mower_model.description: The type of mower you are using.

wheel_track.title: Wheel Track
wheel_track.description: Centre-to-centre distance between drive wheels in metres.

wheel_x_offset.title: Wheel X Offset
wheel_x_offset.description: Wheel axle offset from base_link in metres (0 = base_link at wheel axis).

chassis_center_x.title: Chassis Center X
chassis_center_x.description: Distance from base_link (wheel axis) to chassis geometric centre in metres.

caster_radius.title: Caster Radius
caster_radius.description: Front caster wheel radius in metres.

caster_track.title: Caster Track
caster_track.description: Centre-to-centre distance between front casters in metres.

ticks_per_meter.title: Encoder Ticks per Meter
ticks_per_meter.description: Encoder ticks per metre of wheel travel.

tool_width.title: Mowing Tool Width
tool_width.description: Effective cutting width in metres (2 x blade_radius).

sensor_extrinsics.title: Sensor Mounting
sensor_extrinsics.description: Where the sensors sit on the robot (body-frame offsets and rotations). IMU rotation is normally set via the Auto-calibrate button; edit here only for manual overrides.

imu_x.title: IMU Offset X
imu_x.description: Body-frame forward offset of IMU from base_footprint (metres).

imu_y.title: IMU Offset Y
imu_y.description: Body-frame left offset of IMU from base_footprint (metres).

imu_z.title: IMU Offset Z
imu_z.description: Body-frame up offset of IMU from base_footprint (metres).

imu_roll.title: IMU Roll
imu_roll.description: IMU mounting roll (radians). Applied in URDF as rpy; set by /calibration/imu-yaw service.

imu_pitch.title: IMU Pitch
imu_pitch.description: IMU mounting pitch (radians). Applied in URDF as rpy; set by /calibration/imu-yaw service.

imu_yaw.title: IMU Yaw
imu_yaw.description: IMU mounting yaw (radians). Applied in URDF as rpy; set by /calibration/imu-yaw service.

lidar_enabled.title: Enable LiDAR
lidar_enabled.description: Enable LiDAR and fusion_graph scan-matching (when use_fusion_graph is on). Disable for non-LiDAR builds.

lidar_x.title: LiDAR Offset X
lidar_x.description: Body-frame forward offset of LiDAR from base_footprint (metres).

lidar_y.title: LiDAR Offset Y
lidar_y.description: Body-frame left offset of LiDAR from base_footprint (metres).

lidar_z.title: LiDAR Offset Z
lidar_z.description: Body-frame up offset of LiDAR from base_footprint (metres).

gps_x.title: GPS Antenna Offset X
gps_x.description: Body-frame forward offset of GPS antenna from base_footprint (metres). Used by navsat_transform (robot_localization) for lever-arm correction.

gps_y.title: GPS Antenna Offset Y
gps_y.description: Body-frame left offset of GPS antenna from base_footprint (metres).

gps_z.title: GPS Antenna Offset Z
gps_z.description: Body-frame up offset of GPS antenna from base_footprint (metres).

datum_lat.title: Datum Latitude
datum_lat.description: Map origin latitude (WGS84). Set near your docking station.

datum_lon.title: Datum Longitude
datum_lon.description: Map origin longitude (WGS84). Set near your docking station.

datum_alt.title: Datum Altitude
datum_alt.description: Map origin altitude (WGS84 ellipsoidal, metres) — site-specific; no default. Used by navsat_transform (robot_localization) as the altitude reference.

gps_protocol.title: GPS Protocol
gps_protocol.description: Protocol used by your GPS receiver.

gps_wait_after_undock_sec.title: GPS Wait After Undock
gps_wait_after_undock_sec.description: Seconds to wait for RTK fix after undocking.

gps_timeout_sec.title: GPS Timeout
gps_timeout_sec.description: Pause mowing if no GPS fix for this many seconds.

ntrip_enabled.title: Enable NTRIP
ntrip_enabled.description: Enable NTRIP RTK corrections for cm-level accuracy.

ntrip_host.title: NTRIP Host
ntrip_host.description: Hostname or IP of your NTRIP caster.

docking_settings.title: Docking
docking_settings.description: Dock position (X, Y, Yaw) is set from the map editor. Other docking parameters can be adjusted here.

dock_approach_distance.title: Dock Approach Distance
dock_approach_distance.description: Staging point distance in front of dock (metres).

dock_use_charger_detection.title: Use Charger Detection
dock_use_charger_detection.description: Detect charging voltage to confirm successful dock.

mowing_enabled.title: Enable Mowing Motor
mowing_enabled.description: Enable mowing blade. Set false for testing without blade.

transit_speed.title: Transit Speed
transit_speed.description: Robot speed when transiting between zones and to dock (m/s).

outline_passes.title: Outline Passes
outline_passes.description: Number of perimeter passes before fill mowing.

outline_overlap.title: Outline Overlap
outline_overlap.description: Overlap between outline and fill passes (metres).

path_spacing.title: Path Spacing
path_spacing.description: Spacing between mowing paths (metres). 0.13 gives overlap with 0.18 blade.

headland_width.title: Headland Width
headland_width.description: Width of headland (turning area) in metres.

min_turning_radius.title: Min Turning Radius
min_turning_radius.description: Minimum turning radius for coverage path (metres).

mow_angle_offset_deg.title: Mow Angle Offset
mow_angle_offset_deg.description: Mowing angle offset in degrees (-1 = auto-detect).

mow_angle_increment_deg.title: Mow Angle Increment
mow_angle_increment_deg.description: Rotate mowing pattern by this many degrees each full pass.

battery_full_voltage.title: Full Voltage
battery_full_voltage.description: Voltage at which battery is considered full.

battery_empty_voltage.title: Empty Voltage
battery_empty_voltage.description: Dock if voltage stays below this for 20s.

battery_critical_voltage.title: Critical Voltage
battery_critical_voltage.description: Immediate dock if voltage drops below this.

battery_full_percent.title: Full Percent
battery_full_percent.description: Resume mowing above this battery percentage.

battery_low_percent.title: Low Percent
battery_low_percent.description: Start heading to dock below this battery percentage.

motor_temp_high_c.title: Motor Temp High
motor_temp_high_c.description: Stop blade above this motor temperature (C).

motor_temp_low_c.title: Motor Temp Low
motor_temp_low_c.description: Resume blade below this motor temperature (C).

lift_blade_resume_delay_sec.title: Lift Blade Resume Delay
lift_blade_resume_delay_sec.description: Seconds to keep the blade off after a lift event clears before resuming.

lift_recovery_mode.title: Lift Recovery Mode
lift_recovery_mode.description: Allow autonomous resume after a lift event (default: stay stopped until operator ack).

slam_mode.title: SLAM Mode
slam_mode.description: Legacy SLAM toolbox operating mode. Unused — robot_localization (dual-EKF) is the primary localizer and there is no SLAM backend. Kept for config backward compatibility.

map_save_on_dock.title: Save Map on Dock
map_save_on_dock.description: Persist map artefacts when the robot returns to the dock.

map_save_path.title: Map Save Path
map_save_path.description: Container path where map artefacts are written.

rain_delay_minutes.title: Rain Delay
rain_delay_minutes.description: Minutes to wait after rain stops before resuming.

rain_debounce_sec.title: Rain Debounce
rain_debounce_sec.description: Seconds of continuous rain signal before triggering.
